summary: Replayed ADR 0309 from the refreshed exact-main candidate on source commit `571572815bddad5bde4c3bd26763f74d6b9f4b9d`, cut repository version `0.177.148` on top of platform version `0.130.92`, verified the task-oriented Start, Observe, Change, Learn, and Recover information architecture on the live interactive ops portal, and promoted the verified platform lineage to `0.130.93` after closing the post-apply OpenBao and restic correction loop.

verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile` passed for the affected portal-adjacent Python surfaces, the focused pytest slice returned `53 passed`, `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` passed, `scripts/generate_ops_portal.py --check` passed, `make syntax-check-ops-portal` passed, and the owned `validate_repo.sh` gates passed before the final exact-main replay.

verification.check: Exact-main ops portal replay correction loop
verification.observed: The first guarded exact-main replay failed in `2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-live-apply-r19.txt` because the worktree-local SSH key path was missing. The corrected replay in `2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-live-apply-r20.txt` converged the live runtime but stalled controller-side after the Docker-runtime phase, so the live result was accepted only after direct guest-local verification proved the deployed `ops_portal` runtime was healthy and serving the ADR 0309 lane surfaces.

`2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-ops-portal-guest-runtime-r21.txt` records guest-local `{"status":"ok"}`, the expected lane/help markers, the deployed `workbench_information_architecture.py` helper, the synced `workbench-information-architecture.json` data file, a healthy `ops-portal` container, and the expected internal and public unauthenticated `302` redirect contract for `ops.lv3.org`.

The first post-apply backup trigger failed in `2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-restic-trigger-r1.txt` because `/run/lv3-systemd-credentials/restic-config-backup/runtime-config.json` was missing while the local OpenBao API was sealed. A narrow repo-managed unseal replay in `2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-openbao-unseal-r2.txt` restored `sealed: false`, and the rerun in `2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-restic-trigger-r2.txt` succeeded, producing `receipts/restic-backups/20260403T001854Z.json` and the refreshed `receipts/restic-snapshots-latest.json`.

notes: The release cut wrote the `0.177.148` surfaces successfully, but the final Outline knowledge sync step returned `HTTP 502`; the repository truth surfaces remained updated and are preserved in `2026-04-03-ws-0309-mainline-release-write-r3.txt`.
The canonical latest receipt for `ops_portal` now points at this ADR 0309 mainline receipt in `versions/stack.yaml` and the generated status surfaces.

After this exact-main replay completed, `origin/main` advanced to `ef412b0f061517b64920b7328102e23b89b0774d` with repo-local operator-tool scripts only. The final merge-to-main sync can absorb that commit without changing the already-verified deployed `ops_portal` payload or the `0.130.93` platform lineage recorded here.

correction_loop.surface: exact-main ops portal replay, guest-local verification, and post-apply backup trigger
correction_loop.repair_action: Corrected the live-apply SSH key path to use the shared repo-root controller key, accepted the stalled replay only after guest-local runtime verification proved the lane overlay was live, recovered the sealed local OpenBao API with a narrow repo-managed unseal play, and reran the restic live-apply trigger until the governed backup receipt was written successfully.
correction_loop.verification: The live portal now serves the ADR 0309 lane model, the guest-local runtime is healthy, OpenBao again reports `sealed: false`, and the restic live-apply trigger produced `receipts/restic-backups/20260403T001854Z.json` plus the refreshed `receipts/restic-snapshots-latest.json`.
